advancements.bosses_delight.root.title: Bosses Delight
advancements.bosses_delight.obsidian_gla: Cooking the dragon head and pour obsidian tear on that.
advancements.bosses_delight.ham_above_pa: Put a ham on the gauntlet, remember to recycle this container.
advancements.bosses_delight.lich_smoothi: Filling a skull with magic smoothies, don't curious about how it is cooked.
advancements.bosses_delight.last_stand.d: Consume a food which made of Obsidian Heart to get Last Stand effect.
advancements.bosses_delight.gauntlet_pro: Consume a food which made of Blazing Eye to get Gauntlet Protection effect.
advancements.bosses_delight.intangible.d: Consume a food which made of Ancient Anima to get Intangible effect.
advancements.bosses_delight.gauntlet.des: Gain the Gauntlet after you killed the Gauntlet
advancements.bosses_delight.bosses_hodge: You get the supreme meal now!
advancements.bosses_delight.obsidian_oni: How are onions and obsidian connected together?
advancements.bosses_delight.nectar_jelly: It's a Feature, not a Bug!
advancements.bosses_delight.magic_frozen: Yes, those floating thing are noodles.
advancements.bosses_delight.soul_cooking: Get soul cooking out by extreme cold.
item.bosses_delight.bowl_of_obsidian_gla: Bowl Of Obsidian Glazed Dragon Head
Bowl Of Obsidian Glazed Dragon Brain
effect.bosses_delight.last_stand.descrip: You will keep at least 1 health after hurt by a lethal damage when your health is more than 1, and then gain resistance 5 effect according to the effect level.
effect.bosses_delight.gauntlet_protectio: The damage you taken will be reduced if the damage source is not in front of you.
effect.bosses_delight.intangible.descrip: Has chance to avoid damage, and always avoid damage from projectiles
effect.bosses_delight.breakdown.descript: You can hit through the protection of Nether Gauntlet (including Gauntlet Protection effect)
tooltip.bosses_delight.obsidian_heart_kn: Apply Resistance Effect on you when holding, attack with stronger knock back to the target.
tooltip.bosses_delight.void_thorn_knife: Apply Weakness Effect on the target on attack.
tooltip.bosses_delight.gauntlet_1: Hold on right mouse to break and collect blocks.
tooltip.bosses_delight.gauntlet_2: Maybe you can use it to collect something which impossible to gain...
tooltip.bosses_delight.crystal_fruit_see: Can only be planted on Bedrock and Budding Amethyst.
tooltip.bosses_delight.obsidian_onion: Can only be planted on Obsidian and Crying Obsidian.
tooltip.bosses_delight.nectar_jelly: Right Click on consumed placeable food block to renew the consumed parts.
farmersdelight.tooltip.brimstone_nectar_: Remove all effects and recover all HP after consuming.
farmersdelight.tooltip.crystal_fruit_cid: Add 30 seconds duration to a random effect you have after consuming.
tooltip.bosses_delight.glare_stout: Disorganize all effects duration and level you have which level is lower than %s after consuming.
tooltip.bosses_delight.anima_ice_drink: Add 1 level to a random effect you have after consuming (Up to %s).
